ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the track */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Measure of the track's acousticness */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Measure of the track's danceability */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy level of the track */,
  "is_explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the track contains explicit content (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the track */,
  "mood" TEXT /* Mood of the track */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Measure of the track's instrumentalness */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Key of the track (0-11, where 0 = C, 1 = C#/Db, etc.) */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Measure of the track's liveness */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the track in decibels */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the track (0 = Minor, 1 = Major) */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the track (0-100) */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Measure of the track's speechiness */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track in beats per minute */,
  "valence" REAL /* Measure of the track's valence (positivity) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the track */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track was last updated */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the track was released */,
  "decade" INTEGER /* Decade the track belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_mode FOREIGN KEY ("mode") REFERENCES modes ("mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_key FOREIGN KEY ("key") REFERENCES keys ("key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_decade FOREIGN KEY ("decade") REFERENCES decades ("decade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year of track release */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "decades" (
  "decade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decade */,
  "decade_name" INTEGER /* Decade of track release */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Starting year of the decade */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Ending year of the decade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keys" (
  "key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each key */,
  "key_name" TEXT /* Name of the musical key */,
  "key_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the musical key */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("key_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the musical mode */,
  "mode_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the musical mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "album_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the album */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label of the album */,
  "producer" TEXT /* Producer of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the album was released */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "artist_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the artist */,
  "influences" TEXT /* Influences of the artist */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Hometown of the artist */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the artist (0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_album_mapping" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album */,
  "track_order" INTEGER /* Order of the track in the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id", "album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, content manager, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the track */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the track was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, play) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)
